message.content:
1) The navigation header is **flush/full-width against the top edge** (not inset or floating).  
2) It has a **visible dark background** (semi-transparent or solid dark), **no visible border**, and **no shadow** (no detached/floating effect).  
3) Yes, nav links ("WORK", "ABOUT", "CONTACT", "GET IN TOUCH") and a toggle (moon icon) are visible inside it.  

The header is "stuck to the top edge" (not floating/detached).
